title: isocoma tenuisecta
intro: Isocoma tenuisecta, also known as Purple Sage, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Purple Sage include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Purple Sage can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
